<thought>

<action>

<thought>
The goal (G) is at row 05 column B, which is left of my current position (I’m at row 07 column D facing up). The cell directly forward is row 06 column D which is floor (.), but to ultimately reach G I should head left while avoiding the lava at row 05 column C (L) and the lava at row 07 column C (L). Turning left now aligns me toward the free cell at row 07 column C? Unfortunately that’s lava, so instead I should move forward to row 06 column D to get a safer approach to G from below.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

</thought>
<action>
